fields.name: MAP
fields.description: Displays a geographic overview of all monitoring stations and related assets. Users can visually explore station locations, statuses, and spatial data across the region.

fields.name: STATIONS
fields.description: Manage and view detailed information about monitoring stations, including metadata, configuration, location, and operational status.

fields.name: MAINTENANCE
fields.description: Track and manage maintenance activities for stations and equipment, including service records, repairs, inspections, and scheduled upkeep.

fields.name: DATA
fields.description: Access, view, and manage collected observational data from stations, including measurements, timestamps, and data history.

fields.name: WIS2 DASHBOARD
fields.description: Provides monitoring and management tools for WIS2 (WMO Information System 2.0) data exchange, including system status, message flow, and operational metrics.

fields.name: QUALITY CONTROL
fields.description: Review and manage automated and manual quality control checks applied to observational data to ensure accuracy, reliability, and compliance with standards.

fields.name: PRODUCTS
fields.description: Generate, export, and manage derived data products such as reports, datasets, summaries, and formatted outputs for external use.

fields.name: AGROMETEOROLOGY
fields.description: Access tools and data related to agricultural meteorology, including environmental conditions, crop-related indicators, and climate impacts on agriculture.

fields.name: SETTINGS
fields.description: Configure system preferences, application settings, user options, and platform behavior.
